title: MacroGrid
description: A customizable GUI for command macros.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ff23dcf9bc80feef5b5f300efb29bb5cde14159.png)

**MacroGrid** is a client-side Fabric mod that adds a customizable in-game button panel
to run commands and send chat messages — all with a single keypress.

Press **G** to open the menu. Click a button. Done.

---

## 📸 Screenshots
*The main menu — your buttons, organized in a grid*
![Main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bbbeb13f5aede280d236232195ddfa581f2ff10_0.webp)

*Add & Edit — pick name, color, icon and actions. Live preview shows how it'll look*
![Edit/Add Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ad1f005712801f563fd185e9b8c493c4ee1386c.png)

---

## ✨ Features

- 🟩 **+ Add** — create buttons in seconds
- 🎨 **Colors & Icons** — 10 colors and 40+ icons to customize each button
- 👁️ **Live preview** — see exactly how the button will look before saving
- 🔗 **Multi-action** — chain multiple commands or messages per button
- ✎ **Edit / ⇄ Move / ✖ Del** — dedicated mode buttons for managing your grid
- 🗑️ **Delete confirmation** — two-click confirm so you never delete by accident
- 🔍 **Search bar** — find buttons by name instantly
- 💾 **Persistent** — saved to JSON, editable by hand if needed

---

## 🚀 How to use

1. Press **G** to open MacroGrid
2. Click **+ Add** to create your first button
3. Enter a name, choose a color and icon, add your commands
4. Hit **✔ Save** — your button is ready

**Managing buttons:**
- **✎ Edit** — click a button to edit it
- **⇄ Move** — pick a button, then click another to swap positions
- **✖ Del** — click a button to delete it *(requires a second click to confirm)*

---

## ❓ Why MacroGrid?

Tired of typing the same commands over and over?

- **Builders** — `/pos1`, `/pos2`, `//copy`, `//paste` in one click
- **Admins** — moderation commands always at hand
- **Players** — `/home`, `/warp`, `/spawn` or any chat phrase

---

## ⚙️ Requirements

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [owo-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)

---

## 📁 Config location

`/.minecraft/config/command_gui_buttons.json`
